channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Cheapest World Cup Final seats cost more than average monthly US pay
item.description: World Cup final ticket prices are soaring, with resale seats starting around $7,700 and lower-level seats topping $10,000.

item.title: [BREAKING] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough County deputies recovering after ‘ambush’ shooting in Ruskin
item.description: Two Hillsborough County sheriff's deputies were airlifted to Tampa General Hospital after an armed suspect ambushed them in Ruskin on Thursday afternoon.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida parents have a month to shop for discounted school supplies
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Huge AI data center rejected in Florida. Why are they so controversial?
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Feel the ground shake in Florida Thursday? What experts say it was
[The Florida Channel] 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Florida Economic
item.description: 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Florida Economic first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Florida Economic first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 5-year-old riding scooter in critical condition after being hit by vehicle: North Port PD
item.description: North Port police said a 5-year-old girl has been hospitalized after an accident on Thursday afternoon.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 1-on-1 with Rays analyst Brian Anderson
item.description: Brian Anderson breaks down how Junior Caminero's growth, a versatile lineup, and a mid-season pitching move have Tampa Bay in first place entering the second half.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] A 7.3 earthquake hits Mexico-Guatemala border with no immediate damage reported
item.description: A strong earthquake struck the southern Mexican Pacific coast on Friday, right on the border with Guatemala, and was felt from Mexico City to El Salvador.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Hillsborough County announces reduced in-class screen time for K-2 students
item.description: Hillsborough County Public Schools (HCPS) announced new guidelines to reduce screen time in K-2 classrooms.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Manatee County experiencing medical boom amid population growth to meet healthcare needs
item.description: Manatee County is experiencing a medical boom amid the population growth to meet increasing healthcare needs.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lightning Community Hero nominations open for the upcoming season
item.description: Good Morning Tampa Bay anchor Deiah Riley is entering her third season with the Bolts introducing a new Lightning Community Hero at every home game.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 46-year-old deputy chief at Manatee County EMS arrested for engaging in lewd acts with minor: MCSO
item.description: Officials have arrested a deputy chief at Manatee County Emergency Services for engaging in lewd acts with a minor.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Recall issued for certain Panasonic toaster ovens due to risk of shock or fire
item.description: A recall has been issued for Panasonic Electric Toaster Ovens due to a risk of shock or fire hazard.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Driver dead after car wedges under semi-truck in Winter Haven crash
item.description: One person is dead after a compact car became wedged under a semi-truck at a Winter Haven intersection on Thursday morning, according to the Polk County Sheriff's Office.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Vehicle fire injures one near Oscar Scherer State Park

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Recall issued by Madewell for women's sweaters due to fire risk
item.description: A recall has been issued by Madewell for two women's sweaters due to risk of serious injury or death from burn hazards.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Oscar winner Brenda Fricker, known for ‘My Left Foot’ and ‘Home Alone 2,’ dies
item.description: Oscar-winning actor Brenda Fricker, who played Christy Brown’s mother in “My Left Foot” and the pigeon lady in “Home Alone 2,” has died at 81.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Target recalls specific Cat & Jack children’s sandals due to choking hazard
item.description: A recall has been issued by Target for Cat & Jack-branded children’s sandals. According to the United States Consumer Product Safety Commission, the sandals have decorative pearls which can fall off.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US escalates Iran attacks with strikes on bridges, ports, power infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged major strikes Friday, escalating fighting around the Strait of Hormuz and raising fears of wider regional conflict.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: officer-involved] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Bradenton PD share findings in investigation after officer kills man family says was partially paralyzed
item.description: The Bradenton Police Department (BPD) is scheduled to hold a press conference to discuss the findings of an officer-involved shooting investigation.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Former 'Love During Lock-Up' personality Christopher Chipps arrested in Polk County
item.description: Former reality television star Christopher Chipps is back in jail after law enforcement officials arrested him in Polk County on driving and probation charges.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] SAVE America Act faces steep odds in Senate despite Trump election speech push
item.description: Republicans are pushing the SAVE America Act ahead of midterms, but Senate passage remains uncertain even without Democratic support.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] World Cup beer sales are hopping and brewers hope the stout demand continues
item.description: The World Cup has been a bonanza for beer in the U.S. Bars in Boston reported needing emergency deliveries to keep taps from running dry on some game days.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Breakdown of the key matchups for the 2026 to 2027 season for Tampa Bay Lightning
item.description: The 2026-2027 schedule is out. Sports Anchors Kevin Lewis and Kyle Burger break down key matchups for the season.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Messi bathed Yamal as a baby, now they face off in a World Cup Final
item.description: Almost two decades ago, photographer Joan Monfort didn't think much of his photo shoot of a teenage Lionel Messi bathing a cute baby boy in a plastic bathtub. Not until a remarkable twist of fate.
